name: design-motion
description: Cross-stack motion & design-system direction with a router skill, motion-quality audit, cinematic R3F look-dev, six specialist subagents, and a director output style.

interface.shortDescription: Direct and audit cross-stack motion & design systems.
interface.longDescription: A motion director for repos that mix web 3D and native motion: the design-motion-system router turns vague premium/cinematic requests into a named vocabulary, design tokens, and a routed plan; design-motion-audit returns a prioritized motion-quality punch list; r3f-scene-polish does cinematic R3F look-dev. Ships six specialist subagents and a director output style. Routes single-stack implementation to expo-motion, web-three-r3f, and gsap.
defaultPrompt: Make this app's motion and 3D interactions the standout part of the product.
Audit this repo for motion quality, reduced motion, and 3D performance.
Art-direct this working R3F hero scene to a cinematic look.
